Notice Of Motion, Motion And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities For Protective Order
Off Calendar Sep-01-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT JARED BHATTI'S MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER.

No appearances. Due to no appearances, the parties are deemed to have stipulated to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: the matter is taken off calendar. Notice of settlement was filed on 8/4/16. Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (302/JPT)
